segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.

Timeline:
0-3s: A living room floor covered with half-packed cardboard boxes. Close-up of a cardboard box seam slowly splitting under weight, clothes and household items spilling through the gap onto the floor. The person looks frustrated, hands on hips, surrounded by mess.
3-6s: A bright royal blue CasaBella 24-gallon foldable moving bag enters the frame. Hands smoothly load all the spilled items into the bag in one continuous motion. The dual zipper closes cleanly across the top. The mess is gone instantly.
6-10s: Fast-cut scene showing the person easily carrying the full blue bag by its wide wraparound handles, walking confidently down a hallway. The bag stays perfectly intact, everything secure inside. Bright clean lighting.

Do not start with a perfect product shot.
Do not end with a CTA in this segment.
Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.
The product is a rectangular bright royal blue glossy woven PE bag with wide blue wraparound handles running vertically, dual zippers along the top, and a small white tag pocket on the upper right front. The interior has a silver striped lining.
segments.negative_prompt: No text overlays, no logos, no brand names, no readable text, no slow motion, no abstract backgrounds, no dark moody lighting, no cartoon style, no 3D render style, no product morphing, no color change

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.

Timeline:
0-4s: Fast-cut scene in a different real-life environment — outdoor camping. The bright blue CasaBella 24-gallon bag sits on green grass next to a tent, fully loaded with camping gear. Morning dew beads on the waterproof glossy surface, everything inside stays dry and protected. Natural outdoor lighting, fresh morning feel.
4-8s: Fast-cut scene showing final result — home storage. The blue bag sits neatly on a closet shelf, tag pocket visible with a label. Camera pulls back slightly to show how clean and organized the storage space looks. The bag's rectangular shape fits perfectly, silver interior lining subtly visible through the slightly open top.
8-10s: Short clean CTA. The bag remains centered in frame with a gentle final pose. Text overlay appears: 'Make your moving day cleaner and easier.'

This segment should feel like the continuation of the previous 10-second segment.
Keep the same product identity, visual style, pacing, and usage logic.
The product is a rectangular bright royal blue glossy woven PE bag with wide blue wraparound handles running vertically, dual zippers along the top, and a small white tag pocket on the upper right front. The interior has a silver striped lining.
segments.negative_prompt: No text overlays except the final CTA line, no logos, no brand names, no slow motion, no dark moody lighting, no cartoon style, no 3D render style, no product morphing, no color change
